ddls:
CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Code identifying the school */,
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student group */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report type */,
  "school_score" REAL /* Score achieved by the school for this metric */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score across all schools for this metric */,
  "n_size" INTEGER /* Number of students considered in this metric */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details or notes about the performance metric */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("school_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "principal" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the school */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the school */,
  "enrollment" INTEGER /* Total number of enrolled students */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_years" (
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school year */,
  "school_year" TEXT /* Academic year */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the academic year */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the academic year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the student group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the student group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student group record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student group record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "published_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was published */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., principal, teacher, auditor) */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the user is associated with */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_records" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "school_year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the academic year */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student group */,
  "suspensions" INTEGER /* Number of suspensions for the student */,
  "expulsions" INTEGER /* Number of expulsions for the student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the student */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Current grade of the student */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the student record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_school_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_year_id") REFERENCES school_years ("school_year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_school_code FOREIGN KEY ("school_code") REFERENCES schools ("school_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_records_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES student_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry audited */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor who performed the audit */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was performed */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings of the audit */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the audit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES auditors ("auditor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES school_performance ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "auditors" (
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each auditor */,
  "auditor_name" TEXT /* Name of the auditor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the auditor */,
  "agency" TEXT /* Agency the auditor represents */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the auditor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the auditor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the auditor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("auditor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metric_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric entry */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the metric data */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the metric data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES school_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metric_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)
